provenance.selection_rule: Freeze every cell with at least 8/10 numerical-gate-valid configurations and at least 8/10 numerical-gate blocks.
provenance.expectation: Each frozen cell confirms only if at least 16/20 fresh seeds reach the numerical gates and block there; structural blocks do not count.
provenance.local_shuffle_finding: At 600 transpositions, the original-coordinate gate passed 0/10 while the exact current-coordinate gate passed 10/10. A transposed permutation remains an exact 2D order, so this construction remaps coordinates and is not a geometry-free hard negative.
provenance.note: Frozen after P6-A and before P6-B. Inherited P3 gates are unchanged. Do not edit after freezing.
